title: MapReduce Delegation Token Management
description: The 'security/token/delegation' directory manages MapReduce tokens. 'DelegationTokenSecretManager' oversees token lifecycle. 'DelegationTokenSelector' ensures secure job access. Collaboration prevents unauthorized HDFS access. The 'Manager' pattern is implemented for controlled access in Hadoop MapReduce.
